2295310.name: Rooftop Renegade Original Soundtrack+
2295310.description: Rooftop Renegade Original Soundtrack+ expands all of your favourite in-game tracks into album versions for a new listening experience created by composer John Oestmann. Disc 1 includes a Continuous Mix curated to be a journey of its own. Disc 2 contains all expanded tracks making up the core game soundtrack. Disc 3 contains the bonuses - unheard Beta tracks and loopable versions of tracks to cater for all listening styles.
